programme.title: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
programme.desc: Season 8 Episode 3 kicks off our first open-water shoot of the year as Paul Ethier and Jeff Shippam make their way to the legendary Mattagami Lake for some classic spring walleye action. With competitive tournaments on pause this season, the guys revisit their favourite early-season hotspots—areas they’d normally fish under pressure—now with time to explore, adapt, and enjoy the day. From structure-hopping to dialing in the spring pattern, Paul and Jeff put their tournament instincts to work for a fun, relaxed day chasing hungry post-spawn walleye in Northern Ontario.

programme.title: FishON! | Remote Escapes: Pike Frenzy and Hidden Lake Explorations
programme.desc: In the thrilling Season 7 finale, Paul & Perry and the team venture deep into Northern Ontario, using a Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake with high hopes for walleye. However, the day takes a surprising turn as Northern Pike steal the show with their spirited action. The adventure doesn’t end there—a bonus portage into another lake offers a chance to explore uncharted waters. It’s a fitting conclusion to a season filled with the unexpected and unforgettable.

programme.title: Airtime Ep41: Kayaking The Mighty Rivers of Africa
programme.desc: The world’s top kayakers travel Africa in search of the most dangerous whitewater. Shot over the course of a year, this episode highlights the travel and adventure of world-class kayakers as they embark on a “bigger and better” hunt for the largest waterfalls in a land where emergency services are virtually non-existent.

programme.title: Blue World Ep612: Global Search for the Rare Dugongs + Cave Diving in Florida, USA
programme.desc: Blue World travels the world on a hunt for Dugongs… rare, shy animals resembling manatees that are very difficult to film. But we get lucky in the Philippines with an incredible once-in-a-lifetime encounter! Then, an amazing cave dive at Peacock Springs in Florida, where Blue World divers do their first “traverse”.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep122: F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour from Evian, France
programme.desc: Round 3 of the UIM F1H2O World Championship Tour was held in Evian, France for a fifth consecutive year as the Grand Prix of France raced on the waters of Lac Leman ("Lake Geneva").

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The day starts off with some unique courses of fire that get the All Stars’ blood pumping. With the help of Rogue Ops, New Frontier Armory and Griffin Armament, the teams are outfitted with the most premiere artillery in the industry. Then, the All Stars get out of the heat and head indoors to do some CQC training with Surviving Mann alum, Randy Couture. If anyone thought it would be a break.. they were surely mistaken.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: In part one of the season finale, Laura is immersing herself in all the wonders that are TomKat ranch. Created by Kat Taylor and Tom Steyer, TomKat ranch is part ranch, part laboratory, part educational facility and all around the American Dream. This ranch is doing their part at spear-heading the rural revitalization that will bring about climate stability and a healthier planet.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: We’re back with Valor Clinic to take a deeper look at the inner workings of their foundation, which supports financially struggling veterans. Watch how these dedicated Americans are giving back to their fellow patriots in a big way. Fair warning—Mark’s work at Valor Clinic is a true tearjerker. Next, we take a quick trip to the tropics to catch Aggressor Adventures in action. Kyle Reyes checks in with owner Wayne for an update on how he’s been implementing the A-Team’s sage advice. After saying goodbye to Wayne, the team visits another incredible destination to reconnect with the founders of STAYCA VACAY. To wrap things up, Kyle Reyes stops by Compliant Technologies to experience their innovative product firsthand. And of course, we wouldn’t leave without a live demo of their shockingly advanced invention—The G.L.O.V.E.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail meet with the team at Advanced Vitality to explore the cutting edge of preventative healthcare. With over 60% of Americans facing accelerated cellular aging, the company is looking to scale fast—and needs the right strategy to do it. Next, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s joins the conversation to share how her insect-based dog treats are creating buzz in the pet industry. Her clever and down-to-earth grassroots marketing approach (pun intended) is changing the game for alternative protein sources. Finally, Kevin and Toli sit down with leaders from Hammer Haag Steel and Zenith Trek to dive into the challenges and opportunities of building complex, large-scale equipment and structures.

programme.title: Preview For Mountain Biking Through Slovenia's Countryside
programme.desc:
Experience the quiet beauty of Slovenia by bike in this immersive preview featuring rolling alpine meadows, traditional shepherd huts, and peaceful mountain valleys. This short film highlights scenic cycling routes through Velika Planina, one of Slovenia’s most iconic high-altitude pastures, and the lush valley surrounding Kranjska Gora, framed by the dramatic Julian Alps. From gentle gravel roads to wide-open landscapes, this journey captures the rhythm, freedom, and restorative calm of biking through Slovenia’s countryside. 🌿 This is a preview of a longer cycling and nature film. 🎬 Watch the full-length, commercial-free experience on NatureStream.tv, with access to over 100 hours of immersive 4K nature journeys from around the world. ✨ What you’ll see in this preview:
Scenic countryside cycling in Slovenia Alpine meadows, valleys, and mountain backdrops Peaceful, slow-travel visuals designed for relaxation and inspiration
🚴‍♀️ Ideal for:
Nature lovers & cyclists Travel inspiration & slow TV fans Relaxation, background ambience, or mindful viewing

programme.title: S1E1 Skate
programme.desc: This episode features the inspiring story of founders Miguel and Isabel. Driven by the belief that kids should be free to just be kids, #GoProForACause partner SanSkate is making a real difference in their community. Their mission is to provide a safe space for children who enter the workforce at a young age, giving them a chance to set aside their struggles and enjoy skateboarding. The episode also showcases the very best of GoPro skateboarding, featuring incredible talent from Andrew Brophy, Sewa Kroetkov, Madars Apse, and more.

programme.title: S1E2 Skate
programme.desc: Watch the inspiring story of Mike Rogers, an all-around skateboarding star from Cocoa Beach, FL. A regular competitor at top events around the world, including the Vans Pro-Tec Pool Party, Vans Bowl-A-Rama at Bondi Beach, and the Clash at Clairemont, Mike showcases his skill, style, and dedication to the sport. The episode also features Leticia Bufoni and Cata Diaz as she shares her perspective on women in skateboarding and explains why MACBA in Barcelona has become a world-renowned destination for skaters, with its iconic plaza, unique architecture, and perfectly smooth concrete.

programme.title: S1E3 Skate
programme.desc: Experience the very best of GoPro skateboarding at MACBA, Barcelona, celebrated worldwide as the ultimate Spanish skateboarding mecca. In 2018, we teamed up with Macba Life to follow the local skating community and capture the most jaw-dropping tricks this iconic plaza has to offer. Don’t miss this unforgettable collaboration with #MacbaLife.

programme.title: Hogslayer
programme.desc: The award-winning true-life story of the dual-engine Norton motorcycle dragster designed, built, and raced by TC Christenson and John Gregory of Sunset Motors. The documentary chronicles the Sunset Motors Racing Team’s unrivaled innovation and unbridled courage as they faced unyielding challengers throughout the United States and Europe in the 1970’s. TC and John are featured as they relate their experiences of those years rising from local street racers to the top race team in the world. This is bench-racing at its best directly from the original Sunset Motors in Kenosha, Wisconsin, home of the Hogslayer.

programme.title: The Over-the-Hill Gang 1969
programme.desc: In The Over-the-Hill Gang, a group of retired Texas Rangers prove they’ve still got what it takes when they reunite to clean up a crooked frontier town. Led by Walter Brennan, with Edgar Buchanan, Chill Wills, and Andy Devine along for the ride, these aging lawmen may be past their prime, but their courage, wit, and six-guns make them a force to be reckoned with. Blending lighthearted comedy with classic Western action, this made-for-TV favorite delivers laughs, heart, and a reminder that true heroes never hang up their spurs.

programme.desc: Roy Rogers takes on double duty in Billy the Kid Returns!
